mapper.select: SELECT al.id, al.workspace_id as workspaceId, al.project_id as projectId, al.board_id as boardId, al.item_id as itemId, al.actor_id as actorId, al.action, al.meta, CAST(al.created_at AS TIMESTAMP) as createdAt, u.full_name as actorName, u.avatar_url as actorAvatar FROM activity_logs al JOIN users u ON al.actor_id = u.id WHERE al.item_id = CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID) ORDER BY al.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT uuid_generate_v4()
INSERT INTO activity_logs ( id, workspace_id, project_id, board_id, item_id, actor_id, action, meta, created_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS UUID), CAST(#{workspaceId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{projectId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{boardId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID), CAST(#{actorId} AS UUID), #{action}, CAST(#{meta} AS JSONB), NOW() )
